error_signature: Forbidden - perhaps check your credentials? The caller does not have permission.
title: Google Sheets permission error during update
symptom: When attempting to update a Google Sheets document, n8n returns a 'Forbidden' error indicating that the caller does not have permission.
applies_when: Trying to update a Google Sheets document
not_this_if: Error occurs when reading data from Google Sheets
root_cause: The error occurs when the Google Sheets document does not have the correct sharing permissions for the account being used in n8n. Even if the API is enabled and the OAuth consent screen is configured, the document must be explicitly shared with the account that n8n is using to access it.
fix_steps: Click on 'Share' and ensure the email used in n8n has editing access
Save the changes and try the update again in n8n
agent_instruction: Ensure the Google Sheets document is shared with the correct email that has editing access.
